words.exampleSentenceEn: She has the ability to solve complex problems.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 她有能力解决复杂的问题。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The weather has been abnormal this year.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 今年的天气很不正常。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Welcome aboard the plane!
words.exampleSentenceCn: 欢迎登机！

words.exampleSentenceEn: His absence was noticed by everyone.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他的缺席被大家注意到了。

words.exampleSentenceEn: I have absolute confidence in you.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我对你有绝对的信心。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Plants absorb water from the soil.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 植物从土壤中吸收水分。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The abstract concept is difficult to understand.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 这个抽象概念很难理解。

words.exampleSentenceEn: She is an academic at the university.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 她是大学的一位学者。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The car accelerated quickly.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 汽车快速加速。

words.exampleSentenceEn: She has a strong French accent.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 她有很重的法国口音。

words.exampleSentenceEn: I accept your invitation with pleasure.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我很乐意接受你的邀请。

words.exampleSentenceEn: You need a password to access the system.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你需要密码才能访问系统。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The accident happened on the highway.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 事故发生在高速公路上。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The hotel can accommodate 500 guests.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 这家酒店可容纳 500 名客人。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Will you accompany me to the concert?
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你愿意陪我去音乐会吗？

words.exampleSentenceEn: He accomplished his goal within a year.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他一年内完成了目标。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Can you account for your absence?
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你能解释一下你缺席的原因吗？

words.exampleSentenceEn: Dust accumulates quickly in the corner.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 灰尘在角落里很快堆积起来。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The measurement is very accurate.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 这个测量非常准确。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Don't accuse him without evidence.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 没有证据不要指责他。

words.exampleSentenceEn: She achieved great success in her career.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 她在事业上取得了巨大成功。

words.exampleSentenceEn: He acknowledged his mistake sincerely.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他真诚地承认了自己的错误。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Children acquire language naturally.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 孩子们自然地习得语言。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Animals must adapt to their environment.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 动物必须适应环境。

words.exampleSentenceEn: He is addicted to video games.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他沉迷于电子游戏。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Let's address this problem immediately.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 让我们立即解决这个问题。

words.exampleSentenceEn: We have adequate supplies for the trip.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我们有足够的旅行物资。

words.exampleSentenceEn: You need to adjust to the new schedule.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你需要适应新的时间表。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The administration is very efficient.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 这个管理机构非常高效。

words.exampleSentenceEn: I admire your courage and determination.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我钦佩你的勇气和决心。

words.exampleSentenceEn: He admitted his fault without hesitation.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他毫不犹豫地承认了自己的过错。

words.exampleSentenceEn: They decided to adopt a child from the orphanage.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他们决定从孤儿院收养一个孩子。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Children should not drive when they are not adults.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 孩子在不成熟时不应该开车。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The project is advancing smoothly.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 项目进展顺利。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Technology gives us many advantages.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 技术给我们带来了许多便利。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The company advertises on TV and radio.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 公司在电视和广播上做广告。

words.exampleSentenceEn: We advocate for better education for all children.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我们倡导为所有孩子提供更好的教育。

words.exampleSentenceEn: She showed great affection for her pets.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 她对宠物表现出深厚的感情。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Can you afford to buy a new car?
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你能负担得起买一辆新车吗？

words.exampleSentenceEn: Don't be afraid to ask questions.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 不要害怕提问。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The weather can affect your mood.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 天气会影响你的情绪。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Let's meet in the afternoon.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我们下午见吧。

words.exampleSentenceEn: We'll eat dinner and then go for a walk afterwards.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我们吃完晚饭后再去散步。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Let's try again from the beginning.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 让我们从头再试一次。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Don't stand against the wall.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 不要靠在墙上。

words.exampleSentenceEn: His age is a secret to everyone.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他的年龄对每个人来说都是秘密。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The travel agency helped us book tickets.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 旅行社帮我们预订了机票。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The meeting agenda includes five items.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 会议议程包括五项内容。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The real estate agent showed us the house.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 房地产经纪人带我们看了房子。

words.exampleSentenceEn: I saw him three days ago.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我三天前见过他。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Do you agree with my opinion?
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你同意我的观点吗？

words.exampleSentenceEn: We reached an agreement quickly.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我们很快达成了协议。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Agriculture is the backbone of our economy.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 农业是我们经济的支柱。

words.exampleSentenceEn: We are ahead of schedule.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我们比计划提前完成。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The government provides aid to disaster victims.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 政府向灾民提供援助。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Our aim is to improve education quality.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我们的目标是提高教育质量。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The air is fresh and clean today.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 今天的空气清新干净。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The aircraft landed safely on the runway.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 飞机安全降落在跑道上。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Which airline do you prefer?
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你更喜欢哪家航空公司？

words.exampleSentenceEn: The airport is located 30 miles from the city center.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 机场距离市中心 30 英里。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The alarm clock woke me up early.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 闹钟把我早早叫醒。

words.exampleSentenceEn: She put all her photos in the album.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 她把所有照片都放进相册里。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Excessive alcohol consumption is harmful to health.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 过量饮酒对健康有害。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Stay alert while driving at night.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 夜间驾驶时要保持警惕。

words.exampleSentenceEn: They are alike in many ways.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他们在很多方面都很相似。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Are there any fish alive in the pond?
words.exampleSentenceCn: 池塘里还有活鱼吗？

words.exampleSentenceEn: All students must attend the meeting.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 所有学生都必须参加会议。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Parents should allow children to make their own choices.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 父母应该允许孩子自己做选择。

words.exampleSentenceEn: I almost forgot your birthday.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我差点忘了你的生日。

words.exampleSentenceEn: She prefers to work alone.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 她更喜欢独自工作。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Let's walk along the river.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我们沿着河边走走吧。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Have you already finished your homework?
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你已经完成作业了吗？

words.exampleSentenceEn: I also like reading books.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我也喜欢读书。

words.exampleSentenceEn: We need to alter the plan slightly.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我们需要稍微修改计划。

words.exampleSentenceEn: We need an alternative solution to this problem.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我们需要这个问题的替代解决方案。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Although it was raining, we went out.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 虽然下雨了，我们还是出去了。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The amount of work is overwhelming.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 工作量令人难以承受。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The analysis of the data revealed important trends.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 数据分析揭示了重要趋势。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Scientists analyze samples in the laboratory.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 科学家在实验室中分析样本。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The ancient temple is over 1000 years old.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 这座古庙已有千年历史。

words.exampleSentenceEn: His words caused great anger among the crowd.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他的话引起了群众的极大愤慨。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Look at the problem from a different angle.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 从不同的角度看这个问题。

words.exampleSentenceEn: She became angry when she heard the news.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 听到这个消息她生气了。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Dolphins are intelligent animals.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 海豚是聪明的动物。

words.exampleSentenceEn: He sprained his ankle while playing basketball.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他打篮球时扭伤了脚踝。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The president will announce the new policy tomorrow.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 总统明天将宣布新政策。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The company publishes an annual report.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 公司发布年度报告。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Excessive anxiety can affect your health.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 过度的焦虑会影响你的健康。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Do you have any questions?
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你有什么问题吗？

words.exampleSentenceEn: Anyone can learn a new skill with practice.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 任何人都可以通过练习学会新技能。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Is there anything I can do to help?
words.exampleSentenceCn: 有什么我可以帮忙的吗？

words.exampleSentenceEn: It's raining, but we'll go anyway.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 下雨了，但我们还是要去。

words.exampleSentenceEn: I don't smoke anymore.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 我不再吸烟了。

words.exampleSentenceEn: Please keep your books apart from each other.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 请把书本彼此分开摆放。

words.exampleSentenceEn: They live in a small apartment downtown.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他们住在市中心的一套小公寓里。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The problem is apparent to everyone.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 这个问题对每个人来说都很明显。

words.exampleSentenceEn: The movie appeals to young audiences.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 这部电影吸引了年轻观众。

words.exampleSentenceEn: He appeared on television last night.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 他昨晚出现在电视上。

words.exampleSentenceEn: You can apply for the job online.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你可以在线申请这份工作。

words.exampleSentenceEn: You can apply for the job online.
words.exampleSentenceCn: 你可以在线申请这份工作。
